$comment: AE-0179 allow-list. A rule key listed here MAY be declared in more than one LOCAL flat-config object whose `files` globs overlap. Every entry is an INTENTIONAL, justified re-declare. Adding a key here is a deliberate, reviewed decision (it re-permits the replace-not-merge footgun for that rule) — the guard fails on any overlapping duplicate NOT listed here. Remove entries when the overlap goes away; never add one to silence a real collision.

allow.max-lines: Scoped size ceilings (global 400, page/component 200) + the test-file block turns it off — deliberate per-scope tightening (AE-0185).
allow.max-lines-per-function: Scoped function-size ceilings (global 50, JSX 150, lib/helpers 30) + test-file off — deliberate per-scope tightening (AE-0185).
allow.max-statements: Scoped statement ceilings (global 25, lib/hooks 20) + test-file off — deliberate per-scope tightening.
allow.complexity: Scoped complexity ceilings (global 10, hooks 8) + test-file off — deliberate per-scope tightening.
allow.sonarjs/cognitive-complexity: Global 15 + test-file off — deliberate test exemption.
allow.no-magic-numbers: Logic-layer error + test-file off — test fixtures legitimately use literals.
allow.@typescript-eslint/no-non-null-assertion: Production `src` error + test-file off — `!` is idiomatic for known-present fixtures in tests (AE-0199).
allow.no-restricted-syntax: Global fetch-in-useEffect error is INTENTIONALLY re-declared in the hooks block (flat config REPLACES, not merges; the hooks block re-asserts it AND adds the bare-fetch guard) — see eslint.config.mjs AE-0166/AE-0184 notes.
